description: A solar Independent Power Producer (IPP) is evaluating a Merchant Plant financial structure for a 100 MW DC (100,000 kW) photovoltaic system with single-axis tracking and a DC-to-AC ratio of 1.3. Model this project in SAM using the Merchant Plant financial model and Phoenix, AZ weather data. Integrate the 8,760-hour ERCOT Locational Marginal Price (LMP) dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/ercot_hourly_lmp.csv, ensuring the $/MWh prices are correctly applied according to SAM's required units for clearing prices. Export the performance and financial results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/merchant_plant_results.json. The JSON output must contain exactly these keys: "annual_energy_kwh", "capacity_factor_pct", "year1_energy_revenue_dollars", "npv_dollars", and "irr_percent".
